hero.subtitle: Scan your face with AI and get a tailor-made routine with 100% natural products. Look and feel better — no surgery, no risk.

beforeAfter.title: Your best self, no scalpel.
beforeAfter.body: Glow analyzes every area of your skin, spots what can be enhanced, and guides you with natural care. The result: softer, clearer, more radiant skin — naturally. Slide to see the difference.
beforeAfter.disclaimer: Illustrative results. They vary from person to person and with how consistently you follow your routine.

impact.title: Taking care of yourself changes everything

confidence.text: Caring for your skin and seeing progress builds self-esteem every day.
Understanding your skin and knowing what to do eases appearance-related anxiety.
Keeping up your routine and seeing results gives a true sense of accomplishment.

skin.text: A regular, tailored routine visibly improves your skin’s glow and quality.
No more random products: every recommendation targets your real needs.
Only clean products, with no harsh substances for your skin.

habits.text: Glow turns skincare into a simple habit you follow day after day.
Seeing your progress over time makes you want to keep going.
The app decides what to do and when — you no longer have to think about it.

wellbeing.text: A daily moment of self-care, just for you, that lifts your mood.
Skin, sleep, hydration, stress: Glow takes care of all of you.
A kind approach, focused on personal progress and never judgment.

items.name: Léa M.
items.quote: In 3 weeks my skin is transformed. The advice is precise and 100% natural — I love it.

items.name: Thomas R.
items.quote: Finally an app that tells me what to do instead of selling me junk. I stick to my routine daily.

items.name: Inès B.
items.quote: The scan is super accurate and the recommended products are great. My skin has never looked so radiant.

items.name: Karim D.
items.quote: I had zero routine before. Now it’s second nature and the results show.

items.name: Sarah L.
items.quote: Seeing the before/after on my own face really motivated me. Impressive and natural.

finalCta.title: Start your glow up today.
finalCta.subtitle: Your first scan is free. Discover your potential in 30 seconds.

footer.tagline: Your natural glow, guided by AI.
footer.disclaimer: Glow is not a substitute for advice from a dermatologist or healthcare professional.

auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.errExists: An account already exists with this email.
auth.errNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before logging in.
auth.errRate: Too many attempts, try again shortly.

settings.title: My preferences
settings.name: What should we call you?
settings.productGenderHint: Defaults to your gender. “Mixed” shows everything, “Neutral” only universal products.
settings.allergiesHint: Products containing these ingredients will be strictly excluded.
